elements.name: Pane lifecycle aligned
elements.documentation: Begin from the operator-aligned delegate cleanup and OpenWiki placeholder-reuse rules.

elements.name: Approve pane lifecycle plan
elements.documentation: The operator reviews the final rendered plan before guidance changes begin.

elements.name: Plan approved?
elements.documentation: Proceed only after the operator confirms the scope and execution flow.

elements.name: Return to alignment
elements.documentation: A rejected or materially changed plan returns to alignment without implementation.

elements.name: Assign temporary pane cleanup
elements.documentation: Make the spawning agent retain and close each temporary delegate pane after its result and required follow-up.

elements.name: Close terminal review and research panes
elements.documentation: Add concise terminal cleanup to review and research without interrupting retry, context-gap, or exact-delta follow-up.

elements.name: Reconcile retained work panes
elements.documentation: Preserve accountable and operator-created panes while excluding completed temporary delegates from terminal retention.

elements.name: Start maintainer in placeholder
elements.documentation: Run Codex in the returned worktree pane, verify detection, and assign the stable maintainer name without creating a split.

elements.name: Run or rerun focused checks
elements.documentation: Join the initial and repaired paths before the same focused validation.

elements.name: Validate guidance and activation
elements.documentation: Validate changed Skills, concise policy consistency, activation regressions, and diff hygiene.

elements.name: Exercise live pane lifecycles
elements.documentation: Verify disposable delegate cleanup, placeholder-based Codex startup, and removal of the known empty OpenWiki pane without disturbing maintainers or operator panes.

elements.name: Focused checks green?
elements.documentation: Repair only in-scope failures and rerun the focused checks until green.

elements.name: Repair in-scope failures
elements.documentation: Apply the smallest causal correction inside the approved responsibility boundary.

elements.name: Complete qq Change delivery
elements.documentation: Invoke the inherited reviewed, checked, finalized, one-PR delivery procedure.

elements.name: Green PR ready
elements.documentation: End when the approved change is green and ready for operator disposition.
